app.title: EcoLiveNatal
app.tagline: From ultrasound to your baby's portrait

uploadZone.title: Upload the ultrasound photo
uploadZone.privacyBadge: Your image is not stored on any server
uploadZone.errorSize: The image is too large. Maximum 10MB.
uploadZone.errorFormat: Unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG, or HEIC.
uploadZone.errorHeic: HEIC format is not supported. Please convert to JPG or PNG.

crop.tip: Center the baby's face for best results

errors.contentBlock: The image could not be processed. Try a different photo.
errors.timeout: Generation took too long. Try again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.darkImage: The image is too dark. Try with better lighting.
errors.notUltrasound: This image does not appear to be a 3D/4D ultrasound.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Try again.

disclaimer.text: ⚕️ AI-generated illustrative image. Not diagnostic. The result is an artistic approximation and does not accurately represent the actual baby.
